name: Capterra: Alicia B. — Veterinarian
quote: User-friendly and AI makes workflow efficient. Continued updates make the system better.

name: Capterra: Anne S. — Veterinarian (mobile)
quote: Love the client-facing app — other Digitail vets can access records while traveling.

name: Capterra: Christopher M. — CEO (Pet Resort+Hospital)
quote: We see more patients without being overwhelmed. Ticket resolved in under 15 min.

name: Capterra: Donna R. — Veterinarian (mobile)
quote: Quality, easy to use system for a mobile vet practice. Great customer service.

name: Capterra: Emily P. — Veterinarian (multi-location)
quote: I actually look forward to doing my records. AI dictation picks up on things I've forgotten about.

name: Capterra: Tienne G. — Asst Manager (original users)
quote: The chat feature and AI quick responses are great. Nice to stay busy while waiting on replies.
